sentence: I haere ia ki te kāinga.
Ko Tāne te atua o te ngahere.
translation: Tāne is the god of the forest.

sentence: E noho ana au i Rotorua.
He rite ngā mea e rua.
Ka hoki au ki te kāinga.
Kei te kai ngā hipi i te tarutaru.
translation: The sheep are eating the grass.

sentence: Kei te rongo au i te reo.
Kei te mahara au ki a koe.
Ka hanga mātou i tētahi whare.
Haere mai i muri i te kai.

translation: The mountain is in the south.

sentence: Ka kawe ia i te kete.
Ka whakaatu ia i te pikitia.
Me manaaki tātou i a rātou.
Ko ia te kaitiaki o te whenua.
translation: He is the guardian of the land.

sentence: Ka whakahoki au i te pukapuka.
Ka whakaora te rongoā i a ia.
Ahakoa te ua, ka haere au.
translation: Although it is raining, I will go.

sentence: Kei raro te kurī i te tēpu.
translation: The dog is under the table.
